subcodes.first_line: Ta. Ra. Call thou to mind the mercy of thy Lord unto all who dwell in the world, that He may clothe all existence with the garment of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ت ر ذکر رحمه ربک من فی العالمین جمیعا و یلبس کل الوجود قمیص الفضل لیکون
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
